song.title: All the Way to Calvary
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Oh, how dark the night That wrapt my spirit round! Oh, how deep the woe my Savior found|| When His blessed sunshine Flooded all my soul, Bade the darkness vanish: Made me whole!
[C] Chorus All the way to Calvary He went for me, He went for me, He went for me; All the way to Calvary He went for me, He died to set me free.
[V2] 2) Tremblingly a sinner Bowed before His face, Naught I knew of pardon, Nor His grace;|| Hear a voice so tender, “Cease thy wild regret, I have bought thy pardon, Paid thy debt.”
[V3] 3) O ’twas wondrous love The Savior showed for me! When He left His throne for Calvary, When He bore my trespass,|| Bore it all alone; Praise His Name forever— make it known.
song.author: Mrs. W. G. Moyer
